title: Awards & certifications.
subtitle: Recognitions earned across Paytm, Airtel, and PayU — plus continued investment in the craft.

awards.title: Rockstar Award — PG2 Migration & Monitoring
awards.body: Led the PG2 migration from Ali Cloud to AWS alongside a full CI/CD and monitoring buildout.

awards.title: Paytm Payment Infinity Award
awards.body: Recognized for outstanding contributions in building Paytm Payment Infinity.

awards.title: Rockstar Award — Infrastructure Automation
awards.body: Automated PG2 infrastructure end-to-end with a best-in-class monitoring system.

awards.title: Outstanding JVM Hygiene Award
awards.body: Automated JVM hygiene across multiple microservices for measurable reliability and performance gains.

awards.title: Thank You Award — Big Billion Day
awards.body: Delivered scalable infrastructure and dashboards that carried Big Billion Day traffic.
